match.userMessage:
Classify music design for each scene and generate a unified music prompt for the sequence.

<SCENES>
[
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_1",
    "title": "Reporter at Desk",
    "storyBeat": "Reporter working at desk, announces live time",
    "durationSeconds": 8,
    "location": "INT. MODERN NEWSROOM - GOLDEN HOUR",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour",
    "visualSummary": "Bright professional urgency with calm focused energy and sensory fresh mood"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_2",
    "title": "Producer Approaches",
    "storyBeat": "Producer delivers breaking news update",
    "durationSeconds": 6,
    "location": "INT. MODERN NEWSROOM - GOLDEN HOUR",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour",
    "visualSummary": "Bright professional urgent newsroom energy with warm golden haze"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_3",
    "title": "Paper Reveal and Nod",
    "storyBeat": "Reporter absorbs breaking story details",
    "durationSeconds": 5,
    "location": "INT. MODERN NEWSROOM - GOLDEN HOUR",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh, sensory, effortlessly cool newsroom urgency with calm professional energy"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_4",
    "title": "Rise and Approach Broadcast Rig",
    "storyBeat": "Reporter moves to go live position",
    "durationSeconds": 7,
    "location": "INT. MODERN NEWSROOM - GOLDEN HOUR",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour",
    "visualSummary": "fresh, bright, professional newsroom energy with effortless cool and lifted lightness"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_5",
    "title": "Final Beauty Frame",
    "storyBeat": "Close on glowing screen, transition out",
    "durationSeconds": 4,
    "location": "INT. MODERN NEWSROOM - GOLDEN HOUR",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour",
    "visualSummary": "Bright, professional, calm closing beauty moment"
  }
]
</SCENES>

For each scene, classify:
1. presence: "none"|"minimal"|"moderate"|"full"
2. style: Genre/instrumentation (if music present)
3. mood: Emotional quality (if music present)
4. atmosphere: Environmental atmosphere

Then synthesize unified tags (starting with "instrumental") and a 1-2 sentence prompt for one cohesive music track.

Respond with ONLY valid JSON matching the schema.
